title: Automation Rules
subtitle: Configure event-driven triggers and automated responses for your guild.

empty.title: Get Started with Automation
empty.description: Choose a template to get started quickly, or create a rule from scratch.

noResults.title: No matching rules
noResults.description: Try adjusting your search or filters to find what you're looking for.

templates.welcomeMessageDesc: Greet new members with a custom message in a channel
templates.autoRoleDesc: Automatically assign a role when a member joins
templates.logDeletedDesc: Send deleted message info to a log channel
templates.boostThankYouDesc: Send a DM thanking users who boost the server
templates.banLoggerDesc: Log ban events to a moderation channel
templates.autoThreadDesc: Automatically create a thread when a message is sent

deleteDialog.title: Delete Rule
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

bulkDeleteDialog.title: Delete Selected Rules
bulkDeleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} rule? This action cannot be undone.
bulkDeleteDialog.description_other: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} rules? This action cannot be undone.

form.atLeastOneAction: At least one action must be configured with a type.

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.addConditions: Add conditions to filter when this rule fires
conditions.description: When set, this rule only fires if the event matches all include filters and none of the exclude filters.

errors.cyclicConnection: Cannot connect: would create a cycle
